content: Deleted the app immediately as they require you to create an HP account. There is no legitimate reason to have to create yet another account with another company just to scan a document. I will just scan from my Chromebook that doesn't require any apps to scan or print.

author: Jolke Balt
content: STAY AWAY from HP. I have a laser printer that showed issues from the start. HP customer service is dreadful and completely unwilling to do anything about it. Even though I have printed less than a 100 pages and everything in the printer (including cartridges etc.) are official HP products, customer service advises me to buy a new printer. I will, but I'll never get an HP again. This one will go straight to the landfill.
